question: What of the following services provide a Layer 2 multipoint to multipoint VPN service?
Which of the following best describes how a VPLS populates the MAC forwarding database (FDB) with the MAC address of the attached devices?
options: The network administrator programs the FDB with the MAC address of the attached devices.
The PE router uses ARP to discover the MAC addresses of attached devices.
The PE router examines the source MAC address of received frames.
There is no MAC learning; unicast traffic is flooded to all destinations in the VPLS.
correct_answers: The PE router examines the source MAC address of received frames.

question: Which of the following best describes the forwarding of BUM traffic received on a spoke-SDP in a VPLS service?
options: The traffic is flooded to all SAPs and spoke-SDPs in the service.
The traffic is flooded to all SAPs, spoke-SDPs and mesh-SDPs in the service.
The traffic is flooded to all SAPs, spoke-SDPs and mesh-SDPs in all VPLS services configured on the router.
None of the statements above are correct.
correct_answers: The traffic is flooded to all SAPs, spoke-SDPs and mesh-SDPs in the service.
